content:
✨ personaplex | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Enabling controlled, persona-driven conversational AI interactions via speech.
✨ Key Features: • Real-time, full-duplex speech-to-speech conversational model • Persona control through text-based role prompts • Audio-based voice conditioning • Low-latency spoken interactions • Consistent persona maintenance
📖 Summary: PersonaPlex is a real-time, full-duplex conversational speech model that allows for persona control via text prompts and voice conditioning. It is built on the Moshi architecture and trained on a mix of synthetic and real conversations to produce natural, low-latency spoken interactions with a consistent persona.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
